channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: More rubbish outside 59 & 61, 22nd April
item.description:
In addition to the 4 bags of rubbish left outside, a further 3 bags have been dumped. This is likely to be blown about, foxes will be attracted to the rubbish etc... please help provide a long term solution.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 59, Hearns Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in road, 22nd April
item.description:
Rubbish in road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gwydor Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa dumped, 22nd April
item.description:
Sofa dumped on the pavement Church Road, could you please collect it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 22nd April
item.description:
The rubbish was thrown over my garden and I have left outside of garden wall but there’s also loose rubbish of the same loose in the square

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 79, Copeland Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 22nd April
item.description:
Red paint on brickwork
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Turney Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London

item.title: Lamp 14, 22nd April
item.description:
Street light not working

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London

item.title: Rubbish all over pavement, 22nd April
item.description:
Disgusting rubbish all over the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 22nd April
item.description:
This is a regular occurrence that fly tipping happens on this piece of grass. The nursery is opposite. Each time it encourages more fly tipping it is danger to pedestrians walking by as it can often spill across the pavement..

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Langdon Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in alley way blocking access, 21st April
item.description:
Alley which is used as an entrance to properties is littered with rubbish there for months. It is never cleaned by the street cleaners

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter covered street, 21st April
item.description:
Litter covered street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 133, Landor Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned cars near bomdats centre, 21st April
item.description:
There are a lot of cars abandoned in bomdats centres car oark. Since bomdats has closed no one is monitoring the car park and it just trashed with unused cars. It has become like a car junkyard there. No one can use the car park and its just atracting bad crowds now.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Valley Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown hedge, 21st April
item.description:
The hedge is overgrown of permbroke road 65. The foot path is already narrow. With cars beung larked and hedge being overgrown it makes it realy hard to use the foot path. Depending on how deep the car is parked sometimes imposible
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pembroke Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree and climber, 21st April
item.description:
Obergrown tree and ivy from hillside 10 property is reducing the foot path a lot. Imposible to pass without brushing against the plants. Not possible to pass the foot path for disabled people due it beimg too narrow because of overgrown vegetation.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pembroke Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees, 21st April
item.description:
The trees of nearby properties are overgrwon and taking a huge portion of the foot path. It need to be cut down to make thw foot path normaly usuable again
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pembroke Close, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The hedge is severely overgrown, 21st April
item.description:
The hegde of pembroke road 4 is severely overgown. It takes a huge portiin of the pavement and its getting hard to pass by it. It must be cut down so that the pavement will open again
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Valley Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hilldrop Rd street lamp has been out for 10 days or more, 21st April
item.description:
Street light on Hilldrop Road has not worked for 10 days or more. It's the one on the odd numbered side closest to the corner where the road bends
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hilldrop Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal railing dangerous, 21st April
item.description:
At the Bridgen Road end of Bexley woods there is a piece of metal railing at the narrow entrance on the right hand side (from the bridge, if you're facing the woods it's the entrance on the right nearest the bus stop) that sticks out at eye level as you go through the narrow entrance. I am really concerned that this is at eye level for an average height person - myself, my parents and other dog walkers i have spoken to have all had near misses, it is painted green so you don't see it sticking out. I am happy to take some photos tomorrow but am reporting this before I forget! I am moving out of Bexley on Friday but promised my parents i would report this before it takes someone's eye out.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 57, Bridgen Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builder damaged pavement o/s 22 New St Hill, 21st April
item.description:
Builders are working on 22 New Street Hill and have damaged the pavement outside the property, leaving a shallow hole loosely packed with stones. Sorry,, photos were taken at night under sreet lights so not clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oak Tree Gardens, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp column not working, 21st April
item.description:
Lamp column not working but the one way sign light on the LC is working OK.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Street, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple Bags of Rubbish and Unwanted Furniture Dumped on Pavement, 21st April
item.description:
Multiple bags of rubbish and unwanted furniture has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Orchard Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
